children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation, under the authority of , shall guarantee obligations of the Milwaukee Railroad for purposes of providing employee protection in accordance with the terms of the employee protection agreement entered into under . Guarantees under this section shall be entered into without regard to the requirements of subsection (g) of .section 831 of this titlesection 908 of this titlesection 831 of this title

children.heading: Obligations as administrative expense
children.label: b Obligations as administrative expense
children.text: Any obligation guaranteed pursuant to this section shall be treated as an administrative expense of the estate of the Milwaukee Railroad.

children.heading: Limit on aggregate unpaid principal amount
children.label: c Limit on aggregate unpaid principal amount
children.text: The aggregate unpaid principal amount of obligations which may be guaranteed by the Secretary pursuant to this section shall not exceed $75,000,000.

children.heading: Limit on total liability
children.label: d Limit on total liability
children.text: The total liability of the Milwaukee Railroad in connection with benefits and allowances provided under an employee protection agreement entered into under shall not exceed $75,000,000.section 908 of this title

children.heading: Liability of United States respecting section 908 agreements
children.label: e Liability of United States respecting section 908 agreements
children.text: Except in connection with obligations guaranteed under this section, the United States shall incur no liability to employees in connection with any employee protection agreement entered into under .section 908 of this title

children.heading: Applicability ofsection 22404 of title 49
children.label: f Applicability ofsection 22404 of title 49
children.text: shall not apply to any obligation guaranteed under this section.Section 22404 of title 49
